---
title: "Binomial Distribution"
subtitle: "BINOMIAL_DISTRIBUTION"
id: "binomial_distribution"
toc: True
---

A demonstration course showing how Word-authored content can be converted and inserted into a structured Quarto course.

## Sessions


- [SE01: Core Concepts and Interpretation](se01/index.qmd)

<!-- START_NAVIGATION -->


```{=html}
<div class="custom-page-navigation">
    <div class="nav-prev">
        
    </div>
    <div class="nav-next">
        
        <a href="se01/index.qmd">
            <span class="nav-label">Next →</span>
            <span class="nav-title">Core Concepts and Interpretation</span>
        </a>
        
    </div>
</div>
```

<!-- END_NAVIGATION -->
